# Refactoring Template

## Purpose

Guide behavior-preserving refactors.

## Reference When

Use before moving code or changing internal structure.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Do not mix unscoped behavior changes into a refactor.

## Template

```md
# Refactor: <name>

## Reason

## Behavior Preserved

## Modules Affected

## Safety Net

Existing tests:
New characterization tests:

## Steps

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Risks

## Verification
```
